instruments.name: Music Basics
instruments.description: A pre-instrumental programme introducing children to music fundamentals through singing, movement, rhythm games, percussion & ukulele. A fun and engaging first step into the world of music.

instruments.name: Violin
instruments.description: Learn violin in a supportive group setting. Students develop good bowing technique, posture, and music reading skills while playing together with their peers.

instruments.name: Cello
instruments.description: Explore the rich, warm tones of the cello in fun small group lessons (maximum 4 per class). Cellos are available for hire ($100/year).

instruments.name: Keyboard
instruments.description: Build keyboard skills including reading music, playing melodies, and developing finger coordination. A popular class — waitlists may apply.

instruments.name: Guitar
instruments.description: Learn classical guitar technique: plucking, strumming, reading music and learning beautiful tunes.

instruments.name: Flute
instruments.description: A sweet sounding, beautiful silver wind instrument. Enjoy developing breathing, tone and fingering skills in fun group lessons. Age 9+ (tall enough to hold the instrument).

instruments.name: Recorder
instruments.description: A wonderful first instrument. Students learn music reading, develop finger coordination, and enjoy ensemble playing with others.

instruments.name: Trumpet
instruments.description: A bold, dramatic instrument that is exciting to play! Students learn together in an encouraging group environment. Small class (max 4 students). Must have learnt another instrument for 1 year or more.

instruments.name: Drums
instruments.description: Develop rhythm, coordination, and percussion skills. Learn to read rhythmic notation and play a variety of styles and patterns. Very popular - waitlist may apply.

instruments.name: Choir
instruments.summary: Free for all Gallery students! Sing together with other children.
instruments.description: Open to all Gallery students at no extra cost! Sing together in a fun, supportive group and perform at the annual concert.

instruments.name: Pat Sviatko Ensemble
instruments.summary: Open to students who have been learning an instrument for 1 year or more.
instruments.description: The Pat Sviatko Ensemble welcomes players who have learnt an orchestral instrument for 1 year or more: cello, violin, trumpet, flute, viola, students who have studied for two years and can read music. Develop ensemble skills, collaborative listening, and perform at the annual concert.

instruments.name: Orchestra
instruments.summary: Free! For students with 3+ years experience.
instruments.description: The Gallery Community Orchestra is open to all ages at no extra cost. For students with approximately 3 years of prior tuition. See our Community Orchestra page for more details.
